logo: C:/Users/Golf/Gopremium-website/Gopremium new version/Logo/GoPremium Icon logo - navy.png
anchor: STUDIO STYLE — keep this IDENTICAL across the whole set so every photo clearly comes from the same shoot: a seamless warm off-white / soft cream studio backdrop, bright high-key and airy, soft diffused daylight falling gently from the upper left, a soft natural contact shadow under the product, calm minimal-classic premium mood, warm-neutral colour grade, no harsh shadows, no coloured light. Subject is a plain BLANK natural-cotton canvas tote bag in cream/ecru with cream webbing handles.

shots.input: C:/Users/Golf/Gopremium-website/Gopremium new version/รูปสินค้า/3.Bag/BG001 - classic/กระเป๋าผ้า รุ่น Classic/1.png
shots.scene: Shot: clean hero shot. The tote stands upright and full, photographed straight-on at eye level, centered, filling most of the frame against the plain studio backdrop. No props — pure product.

shots.input: C:/Users/Golf/Gopremium-website/Gopremium new version/รูปสินค้า/3.Bag/BG001 - classic/กระเป๋าผ้า รุ่น Classic/1.png
shots.scene: Shot: three-quarter angle. The tote stands upright viewed from a 3/4 front angle so one side gusset and depth are visible, giving it dimension, centered with a gentle cast shadow. No props.

shots.input: C:/Users/Golf/Gopremium-website/Gopremium new version/รูปสินค้า/3.Bag/BG001 - classic/กระเป๋าผ้า รุ่น Classic/1.png
shots.scene: Shot: the tote stands on a light natural-wood table surface in the same bright studio, slightly low camera angle, a single softly-blurred dried pampas-grass stem far in the background. The bag is clearly the hero, prop stays subtle.

shots.input: C:/Users/Golf/Gopremium-website/Gopremium new version/รูปสินค้า/3.Bag/BG001 - classic/กระเป๋าผ้า รุ่น Classic/1.png
shots.scene: Shot: top-down flat-lay. The tote lies flat on a soft cream linen cloth, handles arranged neatly, with two small minimal props beside it (a folded pair of sunglasses and a short sprig of eucalyptus) kept small so the bag dominates.

shots.input: C:/Users/Golf/Gopremium-website/Gopremium new version/รูปสินค้า/3.Bag/BG001 - classic/กระเป๋าผ้า รุ่น Classic/6.png
shots.scene: Shot: the tote hangs from a single minimal light-wood wall peg on a clean off-white wall, handles draped naturally, vertical, soft side light. Simple and calm, no other objects, no measurement labels.

shots.input: C:/Users/Golf/Gopremium-website/Gopremium new version/รูปสินค้า/3.Bag/BG001 - classic/กระเป๋าผ้า รุ่น Classic/1.png
shots.scene: Shot: macro detail. Extreme close-up of the woven canvas texture and the reinforced stitching where one handle meets the bag, very shallow depth of field, the rest of the bag softly blurred. Tactile, premium feel.

shots.input: C:/Users/Golf/Gopremium-website/Gopremium new version/รูปสินค้า/3.Bag/BG001 - classic/กระเป๋าผ้า รุ่น Classic/1.png
shots.scene: Shot: side profile. The tote stands upright shown from the side, revealing its slim silhouette and the handle loop arching above, centered on the plain backdrop with a soft shadow.

shots.input: C:/Users/Golf/Gopremium-website/Gopremium new version/รูปสินค้า/3.Bag/BG001 - classic/กระเป๋าผ้า รุ่น Classic/1.png
shots.scene: Shot: lightly styled. The tote stands upright and slightly open at the top, with a rolled magazine and a small wooden notebook peeking out of the opening, resting on the plain studio floor. Tasteful; the bag stays the main subject.

shots.input: C:/Users/Golf/Gopremium-website/Gopremium new version/รูปสินค้า/3.Bag/BG001 - classic/กระเป๋าผ้า รุ่น Classic/1.png
shots.scene: Shot: the tote rests on a simple light-wood stool in a bright minimal studio corner, soft daylight, lots of clean negative space around it for an editorial feel.

shots.input: C:/Users/Golf/Gopremium-website/Gopremium new version/รูปสินค้า/3.Bag/BG001 - classic/กระเป๋าผ้า รุ่น Classic/1.png
shots.scene: Shot: cropped in-use lifestyle. The tote is carried in one hand at the side against a neutral beige outfit and a plain bright wall, framed so the bag fills the focus and the person is mostly out of frame. Same bright airy studio mood.
